title: Joseph Joseph Dash™ Pestle & Mortar Set with Bamboo Lid,Gray
description:
About this item
Heavy-weight design carved from hard-wearing natural granite
Bamboo lid keeps mortar clean and dust free when stored
Pestle stores safely on top of lid
Lid can also be used for holding ingredients or as a small chopping surface
Ideal for making spice rubs, pastes, dressings, sauces and marinades
reviews_5s:
This set is very durable. It cleans easily and gets the job done. I love the lid. I do wish it was something other than bamboo. However, it comes it handy. I use this mainly for crushing herbs. Very unique! I keep it on the countertop. The craftmanship is outstanding. Should be around for a very long time.I've used this to crush peanuts for my daughter's "lollipops" - which is a spoon dipped in peanut butter, then rolled in crushed peanuts. It works consistently with the way humanity's used rocks since roughly the dawn of our species. So, it's a perfectly functional pair of rock surfaces to smash food between.My wife has a mortar and pestle made of cast steel. It's rusty brown, ugly as hell, and looks like it was cast in 1938. You don't dare think about how to clean it. But it's still in use. I bought a clean new ceramic one and broke it in a week. This granite one is satisfyingly sturdy. It grinds pepper (for example) to a very fine powder indeed! I'll break it eventually, I guess, but I love it!!!My husband wanted this so I purchased it for Christmas. He lives it and has already used it at least 3 Xs. Very, very strong, solid , easy to use and a beautiful piece.My daughter asked for this for an early Christmas gift. She loves it. Says she just made a great pesto with itGreat set and high quality. You do need to season it prior to use but that’s the authenticity behind a real mortar and pestle!Love it!! Will buy againLove itA well built and solid mortar and pestle which will last for many years to come. It's more expensive than others but it's design is nice and that's what you are paying the extra for. The only negative I have is that the pestle is quite short and can be uncomfortable to hold after quite a lot of pounding the food but I have large hands so might not be an issue for everyone.

Overall I'm very happy with the purchase.Produto pesado e que cumpre a sua função. Bom design que permite guardar o pilão na tampa.
reviews_1s:
Bonito diseño
Muy, muy pesado y grandeIt's not deep (10cm depth) enough that food keeps getting popped out everywhere!!Il n'est pas assez profond, c'est n'a pas pratique.Delivery was on time, but the pestle was missing.
